text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Four, five, six!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year's, Jordan! Wanna grab a burger?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sorry, can't today! Thirteen, fourteen... fifteen!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Agh... Messed up again. Isn't fifteen seconds
exact a bit too specific?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Uhh... So, like... what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My trainer gave me a challenge. If I can count
fifteen seconds exactly...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I get to go out for an expensive meal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is now in her classic year. Up until
now, she's been up against beginners, but this
year will be a different story.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More of her opponents will be trained to their
peak abilities, with a better grasp of how to race
using their unique talents. They'll be ready for
whatever comes their way.
choice_data_list:
(We have to develop a special skill she can call
her own.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For that purpose, I've put together a two-stage
training program to improve her time awareness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For stage one, we're using this stopwatch
training, which is set up like a game so she can
meld it seamlessly into her everyday routine. And
as for the second stage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slide!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Suh, faaam! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, so, about this morning's challenge? All
three of us are gonna do it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta treat us all to the expensive buffet,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! We've gotta run?!
choice_data_list: Two hundred meters in fifteen seconds.
Two hundred meters in fifteen seconds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the second stage, we're aiming to improve the
accuracy of her internal clock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an actual race, a runner needs an accurate
sense of time to judge whether the race is
progressing at a fast or slow pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My aim is to calibrate her internal clock so that
she can read the race and kick off her sprint at
the optimal time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But that's not what you said! All you said I had to
do was count to fifteen.
choice_data_list:
And that's exactly what you'll need to do, isn't
it?

And that's exactly what you'll need to do, isn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Umm... I guess so?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fifteen seconds, then! Grab your
stopwatch—let's do it! Ready...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Three, four...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan counts aloud as she runs. She
finishes one furlong, or two hundred meters, in...

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Argh... Too quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her stopwatch training may have been somewhat
effective. I sense that she's grown.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap, that looks mad fun! ☆ Let me have a
shot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Me too! Just give me one chance!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right, three-person rematch! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them are already off down the track.
And the result...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text:
Yay!
Nooo...
Damn!

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They've completely forgotten about trying to
finish in exactly fifteen seconds.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Because racing gets us, like, jazzed or
whatever. It's only natural, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cool, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All things considered, she took on the challenge I
set for her in her own way, so...
choice_data_list: Shall we head to the buffet?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah! For real?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's cool, no problem! ♪ Let's bounce, ASAP! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, where are we going exactly?
choice_data_list:
A stamina-boosting buffet of carrot hamburger
steaks!

Let's taste the new year with a traditional New
Year's buffet!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, sounds like you really get it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I think my heart just skipped a beat. Or something did, anyway. Maybe my stomach?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Low-key, you're just hungry. ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bingo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So let's go already.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Sushi?! OMG! Yass!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right?! Are you for real, Trainer? You're a genius!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sushiii! ♪
Sushi, sushiii! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Now let's go already.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You mean, like... traditional traditional? Are we going to your granny's house or something?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We can go to my granny's place! You guys are fam, always welcome!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For real?!
choice_data_list:
I couldn't impose on her like that. Let's just go
to a restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Look at Trainer sweat! You gotta lighten
up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Now let's go already.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uhh... No, it's nothing. You go on ahead. I'll meet
you at the school gate in a sec.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Urgh... It's coming off again...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Jordan? What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um... my press-on is coming off. I'm sticking it
back on again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Again? I wonder if maybe your actual nails are
getting weak.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... Nah, they're fine! It's fine! This tape just
isn't strong enough.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If you come across any decent tape, lemme know!
Thank youuuu! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask my makeup artist. You'll want something
that doesn't damage your skin.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, City!
